description: Generic security-team phish with verify-login wording and external /login URL

request.subject: Unusual activity on your account
request.snippet:
Dear user,

We detected unusual activity on your account.
Please verify your login information to avoid temporary restrictions:

https://secure-account-check-example.com/login

Thank you,
Security Team
